name: Bacon'n Eggs Crescent Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until crisp; crumble it.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
3. Separate dough into four rectangles.
4. Place two of the rectangles in an ungreased 8-inch square pan, pressing over the bottom and half an inch up the sides to form a crust, sealing the perforations.
5. Place cheese slices over the dough.
6. Sprinkle bacon and onions evenly over the top.
7. Beat together milk and eggs; pour over the bacon.
8. Separate the remaining dough into triangles; arrange them over the bacon-egg mixture without sealing.
9. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and filling is set.
